# Lean Rooted-Tree Polymer Expansion

> Machine-checked target-preserving Ursell leaf summation for polymer systems with holes.

Canonical repository: https://github.com/lluiseriksson/lean-rooted-tree-polymer-expansion
Documentation: https://lluiseriksson.github.io/lean-rooted-tree-polymer-expansion/
Integrated article: https://lluiseriksson.github.io/lean-rooted-tree-polymer-expansion/paper/
Version: 2.4.3

## Public Lean endpoints

- MarkedRootedClosure.normalizedRootedChildFactorialTreeBound
- MarkedRootedClosure.markedRootLeafGeometricBound
- MarkedRootedClosure.targetPreservingWeightedTreeBound

## Immutable proof environment

- Upstream: lluiseriksson/THE-ERIKSSON-PROGRAMME@4e45246aa109671d25fcd01ba1abf7bc3f8506d1
- Lean: leanprover/lean4:v4.29.0-rc6
- Mathlib: 07642720480157414db592fa85b626dafb71355b

## Claims boundary

This artifact proves finite rooted-tree combinatorics and target-sensitive geometric composition. It does not prove the model-specific raw Yang--Mills activity estimate, hRpoly, a continuum limit, Osterwalder--Schrader reconstruction, or a mass gap.

## High-value files

- README.md — project entry point and verification commands
- docs/paper/index.md — integrated article
- MarkedRootedClosure/PaperTheorems.lean — stable theorem wrappers
- archive/theorem-manifest.json — theorem names, source blobs, statement fingerprints, and claim boundary
- archive/proof-dag.json — machine-readable upstream-to-public proof dependency graph
- archive/UPSTREAM.lock — exact proof and toolchain pins
- requirements-docs.lock — exact transitive Python documentation environment
- docs/artifact/verification-contract.md — acceptance criteria
- scripts/run_lean_gate.py — supervised local Lean build and oracle entrypoint
- scripts/process_runner.py — timeout, signal, and parent-loss process-tree cleanup
- scripts/release_inventory.py — exact 13-file publication and checksum protocol
- docs/artifact/source-provenance.md — proof provenance
- docs/maintainers/agent-handoff.md — safe modification protocol
- AGENTS.md — repository-level agent rules

## Verification

Local: make docs-setup && make verify-nonlean && make package-determinism
Lean gate: GitHub Actions builds once, then runs make lean-oracle
Release gate: read-only verification transfers an exact candidate to a tag-only publisher
Optional local Lean: make lean
